name: Inbound Tech Inc.
summary: Inbound Tech Inc. engages in the CRM and sales outsourcing businesses in Japan. The company offers multilingual contact center services, including multilingual help desk and email translation services; and contact center BPO services, such as inbound reception and outbound call operations. It also provides professional sales outsourcing services that comprise door-to-door and telemarketing services. The company was formerly known as Brainpress Inc. Inbound Tech Inc. was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Inbound Tech Inc. is a subsidiary of a2media corporation.
